blended.narrative: Canyon Ski Resort is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,452 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
